name: TAKE TWO INTERACTIVE SOFTWARE INC
summary: Take-Two Interactive Software is a leading developer, publisher, and marketer of interactive entertainment globally. The company develops, operates, and publishes products through Rockstar Games, 2K, and Zynga labels. Key franchises include Grand Theft Auto (445M+ units sold), Red Dead Redemption 2 (70M+ units), and NBA 2K. Products span console, PC, and mobile platforms, with revenue from game sales, in-game purchases, virtual currency, live services, and advertising.

products.name: Grand Theft Auto V
products.description: Action/adventure game released in 2013, sold-in over 210 million units worldwide, includes Grand Theft Auto Online.

products.name: Grand Theft Auto VI
products.description: Upcoming title planned for release May 26, 2026, during fiscal year 2027.

products.name: Grand Theft Auto Online
products.description: Online multiplayer component of Grand Theft Auto V with ongoing live services and virtual currency.

products.name: GTA+
products.description: Membership program offering rotating benefits including access to classic Rockstar Games titles.

products.name: Red Dead Redemption 2
products.description: Action/adventure game with over 70 million units sold worldwide; critically and commercially acclaimed.

products.name: NBA 2K
products.description: Sports simulation franchise; major revenue driver across console, PC, and mobile platforms.

products.name: NBA 2K Online
products.description: Top online PC sports game in China, offered through partnership with Tencent.

products.name: Civilization: Eras and Allies
products.description: Strategy game offered in China through partnership with Tencent.

products.name: L.A. Noire
products.description: Action/adventure franchise published by Rockstar Games.

products.name: Max Payne
products.description: Action franchise published by Rockstar Games.

products.name: Midnight Club
products.description: Racing franchise published by Rockstar Games.

products.name: Red Dead Redemption
products.description: Action/adventure franchise published by Rockstar Games.

partnerships.description: Partnership to offer NBA 2K Online and Civilization: Eras and Allies in China.
Products developed and published for PlayStation 4 and PlayStation 5 platforms.
